name: library
summary: A room of books — the quantity is the point. Shelves line walls, reading stations in the center, ladder to access high shelves. Dusty and organized.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangular — shelves run along the long walls

primary_palette.note: scroll library — ancient record archive, not bound books

story_prompts: active research in progress — books open on tables, annotations in progress
centuries-neglected — dust thick, some shelves fallen, others intact
recently raided — gaps in the shelves where specific books were taken
guarded archive — librarian's desk near the door with ledger of borrowings

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim (0.3-0.4) — no direct light on books

anti_patterns: shelves against walls, not floating — use the walls
reading surfaces in the open center, not jammed against shelves
avoid bright fires — books fear flame, libraries use candles with care
